ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Pre, Post) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the week was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the week */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the week is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station (e.g., C1, C2) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the station was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the station is active */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nests" (
  "nest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nest */,
  "nest_type" TEXT /* Type of nest (e.g., no, partial, full) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the nest type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the nest type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the nest type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heights" (
  "height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height */,
  "height_type" TEXT /* Type of height (e.g., low, mid, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the height */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the height type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the height type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the height type is active */,
  "min_height" REAL /* Minimum height in meters */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "densities" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density */,
  "density_type" TEXT /* Type of density (e.g., few, moderate, dense) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the density */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the density type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the density type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the density type is active */,
  "min_density" REAL /* Minimum density (number of trees per square meter) */,
  "max_density" REAL /* Maximum density (number of trees per square meter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_healths" (
  "tree_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree health */,
  "tree_health_type" TEXT /* Type of tree health (e.g., healthy, dead) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tree health */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tree health type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tree health type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the tree health type is active */,
  "health_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the health of the tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the observation */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week of the observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the observation was made */,
  "nest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nest type */,
  "height_id" INTEGER /* ID of the height of the tree */,
  "density_id" INTEGER /* ID of the density of the trees */,
  "tree_health_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health of the tree */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the observation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the observation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the observation is active */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the observation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_height_id FOREIGN KEY ("height_id") REFERENCES heights ("height_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_nest_id FOREIGN KEY ("nest_id") REFERENCES nests ("nest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_tree_health_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_health_id") REFERENCES tree_healths ("tree_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_density_id FOREIGN KEY ("density_id") REFERENCES densities ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role relationship */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user-role relationship is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
